config_description:
--Distressed Restaurants with Verified Decline--

Established, well-reviewed restaurants now experiencing a sharp and confirmed drop in customer sentiment.

These are previously high-performing venues where the 360-day sentiment was strong, but 90-day sentiment has crashed by 30%+.

That's a leading indicator of operational trouble, ownership fatigue, or market-ready distress.

Every listing is an independent restaurant (no large chains), confirmed active with 100+ total reviews and an "Active Heartbeat" signal within the last 90 days.

Each restaurant in this dataset has at least one verified and contactable email address.
config_name: Restaurant Sentiment Crashers Prime in Florida, US
